description: Initial execution result for task task2

data.task_objective: Decompose each actionable component into specialized atomic subtasks
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Parse the high-level user objective into core actionable components
  Result: ```python
[
    "Define target audience for marketing campaign",
    "Determine key marketing channels",
    "Create marketing content for each channel",
    "Set up tracking for campaign performance",
    "Launch marketing campaigns on selected channels",
    "Monitor campaign performance and engagement",
    "Analyze campaign data and generate reports",
    "Optimize campaigns based on performance data",
    "Manage marketing budget allocation",
    "Communicate campaign updates to stakeholders"
]
```
Task task1:
  Objective: Define criteria for what constitutes an atomic executable subtask
  Result: ```python
[
    "Single-responsibility: performs one well-defined action",
    "Independent-execution: can run without dependency on other subtasks",
    "Clear-inputs: requires minimal, well-defined inputs",
    "Explicit-outputs: produces precisely specified results or side-effects",
    "Deterministic: same inputs always produce identical outputs",
    "Machine-executable: runs automatically without manual intervention",
    "Minimal-scope: contains only the essential steps for its objective",
    "Error-handling: includes defined procedures for detecting and reporting failures",
    "Repeatable: safe to run multiple times with consistent results",
    "Standardized-naming: follows a consistent naming convention"
]
```
